Memories matching any pattern are skipped."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"profile_isolation"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"False"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Enable per-profile memory isolation via Mnemosyne banks. Each Hermes profile gets its own SQLite database under mnemosyne/data/banks/<profile>/. Default false for backward compatibility."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"shared_surface_path"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"data/shared/mnemosyne.db"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"SQLite path for shared surface memories. Default is <mnemosyne>/data/shared/mnemosyne.db."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"shared_surface_read"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"False"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"When true, mnemosyne_recall merges shared-surface results into private bank recall, tagging each result with its bank ('private' or 'surface'). Default false."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"skip_contexts"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"cron,flush,subagent,background,skill_loop"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Agent contexts where Mnemosyne should skip initialization. Comma-separated list. Defaults to 'cron,flush,subagent,background,skill_loop'. Set to empty string to enable all contexts. Also configurable via MNEMOSYNE_SKIP_CONTEXTS env var."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"sync_roles"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"['user', 'assistant']"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Conversation roles to autosave in sync_turn(). List of role names: 'user', 'assistant'. Default ['user', 'assistant'] saves both. Set to ['user'] for user turns only, or [] to disable conversation autosave entirely. Does not affect explicit mnemosyne_remember calls. Identity signal capture is gated by user sync — excluding 'user' also disables identity extraction. Also configurable via MNEMOSYNE_SYNC_ROLES env var."}]]}]]}]]}],"\n","\n","$L4"],["$L5"],"$L6"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"bLdIFQuLJKVWSPykPPUJl"}
